name: Ushio (潮うしお)
ingredients: Assorted premium nigiri sushi (tuna, salmon, shrimp, squid, etc.), miso soup, and sides
suggestion: Pairs well with green tea or cold Japanese beer

name: Yukari (縁ゆかり)
ingredients: 9 pieces of assorted nigiri sushi + sides, miso soup
suggestion: Great with wasabi, soy sauce, and pickled ginger

name: Miyabi (雅みやび)
ingredients: Premium nigiri set (8 pieces) + maki rolls, miso soup

name: Jou Sushi (上寿司)
ingredients: Luxury sushi set with 12 pieces including otoro (fatty tuna) and various premium toppings
suggestion: Enjoy with high-quality sake or green tea

name: Sake Sanshoku Don (鮪三色丼)
ingredients: Three varieties of tuna over rice bowl, with miso soup
suggestion: Goes well with seaweed salad or edamame

name: Barachirashi Don (バラチラシ丼)
ingredients: Colorful scattered sushi bowl with mixed seafood, vegetables, and fish roe
